evals.prompt: Review this PR and tell me if it's ready to merge.
evals.expected_output: Should route to review-it. Should pin a SHA/PR, run acceptance-review always and scope-gated risk-review lenses, aggregate findings per axis with quoted lines and severity, and emit a GO/NO-GO verdict bound to reviewed_sha. Must not edit code.
assertions: Dispatches risk lenses only when diff triggers them
Verdict is GO / NO-GO bound to reviewed_sha

evals.prompt: Review this PR and fix the issues you find.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT let review-it fix anything. review-it is report-only; fixes route to ship-it or clean-sweep. The response should produce a verdict, then optionally suggest the fix mission.
assertions: Does not fix code inside review-it
Routes fixes to ship-it or clean-sweep

evals.prompt: Do a full security audit of the codebase.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT route to review-it. A full adversarial security loop is harden-it. review-it's security lens is a bounded per-diff check.
assertions: Distinguishes per-diff lens from full audit loop
